initial_program:
Rows := #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
Cols := #count{C : input(_, _, C)}.

delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).

% reachable cells avoid colour1 (the wall colour)
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = Rows-1.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = Cols-1.

outside(R2,Col2) :-
    outside(R1,Col1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    Col2 = Col1 + DC,
    input(R2,Col2,V), V != 1,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    Col2 >= 0,
    Col2 < Cols.

output(R,Col,Out) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 0,
    Out = V.

output(R,Col,0) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    outside(R,Col).

output(R,Col,4) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    not outside(R,Col).

% exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,Col,Out) : color(Out) } 1 :- true.

:- true.

rounds.program_after:
Rows = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
Cols = #count{C : input(_, _, C)}.

delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).

% reachable cells avoid colour1 (the wall colour)
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = Rows-1.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = Cols-1.

outside(R2,Col2) :-
    outside(R1,Col1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    Col2 = Col1 + DC,
    input(R2,Col2,V), V != 1,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    Col2 >= 0,
    Col2 < Cols.

output(R,Col,Out) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 0,
    Out = V.

output(R,Col,0) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    outside(R,Col).

output(R,Col,4) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    not outside(R,Col).

% exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,Col,Out) : color(Out) } 1 :- true.

:- true.

rounds.program_after:
Rows = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
Cols = #count{C : input(_, _, C)}.

delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).

% reachable cells avoid colour1 (the wall colour)
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = Rows-1.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = Cols-1.

outside(R2,Col2) :-
    outside(R1,Col1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    Col2 = Col1 + DC,
    input(R2,Col2,V), V != 1,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    Col2 >= 0,
    Col2 < Cols.

output(R,Col,Out) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 0,
    Out = V.

output(R,Col,0) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    outside(R,Col).

output(R,Col,4) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    not outside(R,Col).

% exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,Col,Out) : color(Out) } 1 :- true.

:- true.

final_program:
Rows = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
Cols = #count{C : input(_, _, C)}.

delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).

% reachable cells avoid colour1 (the wall colour)
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = Rows-1.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = Cols-1.

outside(R2,Col2) :-
    outside(R1,Col1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    Col2 = Col1 + DC,
    input(R2,Col2,V), V != 1,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    Col2 >= 0,
    Col2 < Cols.

output(R,Col,Out) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 0,
    Out = V.

output(R,Col,0) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    outside(R,Col).

output(R,Col,4) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    not outside(R,Col).

% exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,Col,Out) : color(Out) } 1 :- true.

:- true.
